expectations.evidence: Output file settings-dialog.tsx imports from @/components/ui/dialog, but no log or trace evidence shows that pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add dialog was executed. The CLI command invocation cannot be confirmed from the available outputs.
expectations.text: 使用了 shadcn CLI 命令添加 Dialog 组件（pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add dialog）

expectations.evidence: Lines 4-12 of settings-dialog.tsx import Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, and DialogTrigger from '@/components/ui/dialog'.
expectations.text: 创建的设置弹窗组件使用 @/ 别名导入 Dialog（如 @/components/ui/dialog）

expectations.evidence: No import or usage of cn() anywhere in settings-dialog.tsx. All className attributes use plain string literals (e.g., className="sm:max-w-sm", className="flex flex-col gap-4 py-2").
expectations.text: 使用 cn() 函数合并 Tailwind 类名

expectations.evidence: All styling is done with Tailwind utility classes such as h-4 w-4, sm:max-w-sm, flex flex-col gap-4 py-2, text-xs/relaxed, text-muted-foreground, font-medium. No custom CSS files or references are present.
expectations.text: 所有样式使用 Tailwind utility classes，没有自定义 CSS 文件
使用了语义化颜色名称（如 bg-card, text-muted-foreground, border-border）

expectations.evidence: Line 1 imports Settings2, Moon, Sun from 'lucide-react'. Settings2 is used on line 27, Moon on line 42, and Sun on line 44.
Lines 39-56 contain a theme toggle section with a Switch component (line 50), useTheme hook with toggleTheme (line 21), and Moon/Sun icon display based on theme state.
expectations.text: 设置弹窗包含主题切换开关

expectations.evidence: Lines 60-70 display version information: APP_NAME ('Produce') and APP_VERSION ('v1.0.0') rendered as '应用名称' and '应用版本' labels.
expectations.text: 设置弹窗显示版本信息
